shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Projectile sheet supports launch, travel, and reflected travel readability.
Travel speed grounds to the GDD thunder value of 320 px per second.
differences: This file carries the thunder attribute colorway with a narrow spear silhouette.
Bolt fork and cyan reflection rim update across 6 frames at 14 fps.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground projectile readability against the academy hall.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground the 30x30 thunder projectile size and 320 px per second speed.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/obstacles_thunder_spell_projectile_6f_14fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under obstacles_thunder_spell_projectile_6f_14fps.
runtime_notes: Create a 6-column TextureAtlasLayout and loop it during projectile flight.
Move the projectile by Transform translation with no physics engine dependency.
Use the same collision anchor in launch and reflected directions so timing remains deterministic.

context.usage: Used for fast warning-to-impact beats during thunder-attribute attacks.

shape.silhouette: Narrow lightning spear with a bright core, forked front tip, and a short flicker tail.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 180x30 px with 6 frames.
Projectile body stays inside a 30x30 bounding box in every frame.
Thunder body uses #FFD700 and #FFFACD while the reflected rim reserves #00FFFF only for the edge accent.
